title: goldfussia anfractuosa
intro: Goldfussia anfractuosa, also known as Anisomeles anfractuosa, is a flowering plant native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory infections, due to its expectorant and mucolytic properties. Goldfussia anfractuosa can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to utilize its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
